## Notes for Agents Reading This File

- The commit list shows what changed recently, not what is currently in progress
- Use "Active Tasks" to understand current work scope
- Use "Blocked Items" before assuming you can proceed with a task
- If HANDOVER.md exists at the project root, read it before this file —

- Do not modify the commit-log section directly — the pre-commit hook owns it
